updateToast.availableDownloading: A new version is available. The update is downloading in the background.
updateToast.releaseNotesCouldNotBeLoaded: Release notes could not be loaded.
updateToast.downloadedRestartPrompt: Update downloaded. Restart now to finish installing the new version.

settings.title: Settings
settings.openAppsDescription: Customize the Open in menu shown in the title bar and file previews.
settings.projectsDescription: Group related workspaces and reorder projects within each group.
settings.usageDescription: Review current Codex usage and reset timing. Values currently show {{mode}}.
settings.groupsDescription: Create group labels for related repositories.
settings.projectsAssignDescription: Assign projects to groups and adjust their order.
settings.displayDescription: Tune visuals and audio alerts to your preferences.
settings.showRemainingCodexLimitsDescription: Display what is left instead of what is used.
settings.showFilePathInMessagesDescription: Display the parent path next to file links in messages.
settings.splitChatDiffPanes: Split chat and diff center panes
settings.splitChatDiffPanesDescription: Show chat and diff side by side instead of swapping between them.
settings.unlimitedChatHistoryDescription: Keep full thread history in memory (may impact performance).
settings.reduceTransparencyDescription: Use solid surfaces instead of glass.
settings.codeFontHelp: Applies to git diffs and other mono-spaced readouts.
settings.codeFontSizeHelp: Adjusts code and diff text size.
settings.notificationSoundsDescription: Play a sound when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
settings.systemNotificationsDescription: Show a system notification when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
settings.subAgentNotificationsDescription: Include spawned sub-agent threads in system notifications.
settings.gitDescription: Manage how diffs are loaded in the Git sidebar.
settings.ignoreWhitespaceChangesDescription: Hides whitespace-only changes in local and commit diffs.
settings.commitMessagePromptHelp: Used when generating commit messages. Include {diff} to insert the git diff.
settings.commitMessageModelHelp: The model used when generating commit messages. Leave on default to use the workspace model.
settings.aboutDescription: App version, build metadata, and update controls.
settings.automaticallyCheckUpdatesDescription: When enabled, CodexMonitor checks for new app versions on launch.
settings.updatesUnavailable: Updates are unavailable in this runtime.
settings.latestVersion: You are on the latest version.
settings.environmentsDescription: Configure per-project setup scripts and worktree locations.
settings.envManagerHelp: Install Node.js, Codex CLI, and Claude Code into the app directory and keep their status in env.json.
settings.envInstallUnsupported: Automated installs are currently supported on Windows ARM64 only.
settings.globalWorktreesRootHelp: Default location for new worktrees when a project does not override it. Each project gets its own subfolder under this root.
settings.setupScriptHelp: Runs once in a dedicated terminal after each new worktree is created.
settings.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable in this environment. Copy the script manually instead.
settings.couldNotWriteToClipboard: Could not write to the clipboard. Copy the script manually instead.
settings.worktreesFolderHelp: Custom location for this project's worktrees. Leave empty to use the global root or the built-in default.
settings.mobileSimplifiedSubtitle: Configure TCP host/token from your desktop setup, then run a connection test.
settings.subtitle: Configure how CodexMonitor exposes TCP backend access for mobile and remote clients. Desktop usage remains local unless you explicitly connect through remote mode.
settings.backendModeHelp: Local keeps desktop requests in-process. Remote routes desktop requests through the same TCP transport path used by mobile clients.
settings.mobileDaemonErrorState: Mobile daemon is in an error state.
settings.displaySubsectionDescription: Adjust how the window renders backgrounds and effects.
settings.chatHistoryDescription: Control how much conversation history is retained per thread.
settings.scrollbackPresetHelp: Higher values keep more history but may increase memory usage. Use "Sync from server" on a thread to re-fetch older messages.
settings.scrollbackRangeHelp: Range: {{min}}–{{max}}. Counts messages, tool calls, and other conversation items.
settings.uiFontHelp: Applies to all UI text. Leave empty to use the default system font stack.
settings.subtitle: Configure the Codex CLI used by CodexMonitor and validate the install.
settings.fileHelp: Create agents and worktrees from the keyboard.
settings.composerHelp: Cycle between model, access, reasoning, and collaboration modes.

settingsDictation.subtitle: Enable microphone dictation with on-device transcription.
settingsDictation.enableDictationSubtitle: Downloads the selected Whisper model on first use.
settingsDictation.autoDetectHelp: Auto-detect stays on; this nudges the decoder toward your preference.
settingsDictation.holdKeyHelp: Hold the key to start dictation, release to stop and process.

settingsShortcuts.subtitle: Customize keyboard shortcuts for file actions, composer, panels, and navigation.
settingsShortcuts.filterHelp: Filter by section name, action, or default shortcut.
settingsShortcuts.fileHelp: Create agents and worktrees from the keyboard.
settingsShortcuts.composerHelp: Cycle between model, access, reasoning, and collaboration modes.
settingsShortcuts.cycleModelHelp: Press a new shortcut while focused. Default: {{shortcut}}

settingsServer.subtitle: Configure how CodexMonitor exposes TCP backend access for mobile and remote clients. Desktop usage remains local unless you explicitly connect through remote mode.
settingsServer.mobileSimplifiedSubtitle: Configure TCP host/token from your desktop setup, then run a connection test.
settingsServer.backendModeHelp: Local keeps desktop requests in-process. Remote routes desktop requests through the same TCP transport path used by mobile clients.
settingsServer.mobileDaemonErrorState: Mobile daemon is in an error state.
settingsServer.mobileDaemonHelp: Start this daemon before connecting from iOS. It uses your current token and listens on 0.0.0.0:<port>, matching your configured host port.
settingsServer.keepDaemonRunning: Keep daemon running after app closes
settingsServer.keepDaemonRunningHelp: If disabled, CodexMonitor stops managed TCP daemon processes before exit.
settingsServer.commandTemplate: Command template (manual fallback) for starting the daemon:
settingsServer.remoteBackendTokenEmpty: Remote backend token is empty. Set one before exposing daemon access.
settingsServer.desktopAppDaemonRunning: Make sure your desktop app daemon is running and reachable on Tailscale, then retry
settingsServer.switchActiveRemoteHelp: Switch the active remote here. The fields below edit the active entry.
settingsServer.tailscaleHostHelpMobile: Use the WebSocket relay URL from your desktop LadonX app (Server section).
settingsServer.tailscaleHostHelpDesktop: This relay URL/token is used by mobile clients and desktop remote-mode testing.
settingsServer.installTailscaleHelp: Install Tailscale on both desktop and iOS to continue.
settingsServer.mobileInfrastructureHelp: Use your own infrastructure only. On iOS, get the WebSocket relay URL and token from your desktop LadonX setup.
settingsServer.desktopInfrastructureHelp: Mobile access should stay scoped to your own infrastructure. LadonX does not provide hosted backend services.
settingsServer.deleteRemoteMessage: Remove {{name}} from saved remotes? This only removes the profile from this device.

settingsCodex.subtitle: Configure the Codex CLI used by CodexMonitor and validate the install.
settingsCodex.leaveEmptyHelp: Leave empty to use the system PATH resolution.
settingsCodex.extraFlagsHelp: Extra flags passed before app-server. Use quotes for values with spaces.
settingsCodex.settingsApplyHelp: These settings apply to the shared Codex app-server used across all connected workspaces.
settingsCodex.unsupportedFlagsHelp: Per-thread override processing ignores unsupported flags: -m/--model, -a/--ask-for-approval, -s/--sandbox, --full-auto, --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox, --oss, --local-provider, and --no-alt-screen.
settingsCodex.addWorkspaceHelp: Add a workspace to load available models.
settingsCodex.loadingModels: Loading models from the first workspace…
settingsCodex.modelSourceHelp: Sourced from the first workspace and used when there is no thread-specific override.
settingsCodex.reasoningSupportedHelp: Available options depend on the selected model.
settingsCodex.reasoningNotSupportedHelp: The selected model does not expose reasoning effort options.
settingsCodex.readOnlyHelp: Edit external files and use the internet with approval.
settingsCodex.onRequestHelp: Only request approval for risky actions.
settingsCodex.fullAccessHelp: Can access any file on your computer and the internet without limits.
settingsCodex.accessModeHelp: Used when there is no thread-specific override.
settingsCodex.reviewModeHelp: Choose whether /review runs in the current thread or a detached review thread.
settingsCodex.globalAgentsPlaceholder: Add global instructions for Codex agents…

settingsFeatures.subtitle: Manage stable and experimental Codex features.
settingsFeatures.personalityHelp: Choose Codex communication style (writes top-level personality in config.toml).
settingsFeatures.pauseQueuedMessages: Pause queued messages when a response is required
settingsFeatures.pauseQueuedMessagesHelp: Keep queued messages paused while Codex is waiting for plan accept/changes or your answers.
settingsFeatures.noStableFeatures: No stable feature flags returned by Codex.
settingsFeatures.noExperimentalFeatures: No preview or under-development feature flags returned by Codex.
settingsFeatures.connectWorkspaceHelp: Connect a workspace to load Codex feature flags.

featureDescriptions.undo: Create a ghost commit at each turn.
featureDescriptions.unified_exec: Use the single unified PTY-backed exec tool.
featureDescriptions.js_repl: Enable JavaScript REPL tools backed by a persistent Node kernel.
featureDescriptions.js_repl_tools_only: Only expose js_repl tools directly to the model.
featureDescriptions.search_tool: Removed legacy search flag kept for backward compatibility.
featureDescriptions.runtime_metrics: Enable runtime metrics snapshots via a manual reader.
featureDescriptions.sqlite: Persist rollout metadata to a local SQLite database.
featureDescriptions.memory_tool: Enable startup memory extraction and memory consolidation.
featureDescriptions.child_agents_md: Append additional AGENTS.md guidance to user instructions.
featureDescriptions.use_linux_sandbox_bwrap: Use the bubblewrap-based Linux sandbox pipeline.
featureDescriptions.request_rule: Allow approval requests and exec rule proposals.
featureDescriptions.experimental_windows_sandbox: Removed Windows sandbox flag kept for backward compatibility.
featureDescriptions.elevated_windows_sandbox: Removed elevated Windows sandbox flag kept for backward compatibility.
featureDescriptions.enable_request_compression: Compress streaming request bodies sent to codex-backend.
featureDescriptions.apps_mcp_gateway: Route Apps MCP calls through the configured gateway.
featureDescriptions.skill_mcp_dependency_install: Allow prompting and installing missing MCP dependencies.
featureDescriptions.skill_env_var_dependency_prompt: Prompt for missing skill environment variable dependencies.
featureDescriptions.steer: Enable turn steering capability when supported by Codex.
featureDescriptions.responses_websockets: Use Responses API WebSocket transport for OpenAI by default.
featureDescriptions.responses_websockets_v2: Enable Responses API WebSocket v2 mode.
featureDescriptions.removed: Legacy feature flag kept for backward compatibility.

settingsAgents.subtitle: Configure multi-agent execution and agent management.
settingsAgents.multiAgentHelp: Enable parallel execution of multiple Codex agents.
settingsAgents.maxThreadsHelp: Maximum number of agents to run in parallel ({{min}}-{{max}}).
settingsAgents.maxDepthHelp: Maximum depth of agent spawn hierarchy ({{min}}-{{max}}).
settingsAgents.agentConfigHelp: Open the agents configuration directory in {{fileManager}}.
settingsAgents.createAgentHelp: Define a new custom agent with specific behavior.
settingsAgents.descriptionPlaceholder: A helpful assistant that specializes in…
settingsAgents.manageAgentsHelp: Edit or delete existing custom agents.
settingsAgents.confirmDeleteHelp: Are you sure you want to delete {{agent}}? This action cannot be undone.
settingsAgents.renameManagedFileHelp: Update the filename when changing the agent name.
settingsAgents.builtInRolesHelp: Built-in roles from Codex are still available: default, explorer, and worker.
settingsAgents.maxThreadsHelp: Maximum open agent threads. Valid range: 1-12. Changes save immediately.
settingsAgents.maxDepthHelp: Maximum nested spawn depth. Valid range: 1-4. Changes save immediately.
settingsAgents.createAgentHelp: Add a custom role under [agents.<name>] and create its config file.
settingsAgents.name: Name
settingsAgents.generateWithAI: Generate description and developer instructions with AI
settingsAgents.loadingModelsHelp: Loading workspace model metadata. Using fallback model defaults for now.
settingsAgents.usingFallbackModels: Using fallback model defaults until workspace model metadata is available.
settingsAgents.configuredAgentsHelp: Manage custom roles and their per-agent config files.
settingsAgents.deleteAgentQuestion: Delete agent and managed config file?
settingsAgents.maxThreadsRangeError: Max threads must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.
settingsAgents.maxDepthRangeError: Max depth must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.

account.subtitle: View the current sign-in state for the active workspace and switch accounts when needed.

settingsComposer.title: Composer
settingsComposer.subtitle: Control helpers and formatting behavior inside the message editor.
settingsComposer.followUpHintSubtitle: Displays queue/steer shortcut guidance above the composer.
settingsComposer.steerUnavailable: Steer is unavailable in the current Codex config. Follow-ups will queue.
settingsComposer.presetsSubtitle: Choose a starting point and fine-tune the toggles below.
settingsComposer.presetHelp: Presets update the toggles below. Customize any setting after selecting.
settingsComposer.expandFencesOnSpaceSubtitle: Typing ``` then Space inserts a fenced block.
settingsComposer.expandFencesOnEnterSubtitle: Use Enter to expand ``` lines when enabled.
settingsComposer.supportLanguageTagsSubtitle: Allows ```lang + Space to include a language.
settingsComposer.wrapSelectionInFencesSubtitle: Wraps selected text when creating a fence.
settingsComposer.copyBlocksWithoutFencesSubtitle: When enabled, Copy is plain text. Hold {{optionKey}} to include ``` fences.
settingsComposer.autoWrapMultilinePasteSubtitle: Wraps multi-line paste inside a fenced block.
settingsComposer.autoWrapCodeLikeSingleLinesSubtitle: Wraps long single-line code snippets on paste.
settingsComposer.continueListsOnShiftEnterSubtitle: Continues numbered and bulleted lists when the line has content.

aspnetCore.description: [Windows only] Build and review ASP.NET Core projects
details: Review ASP.NET Core APIs and services.
Work with controllers, models, and data flows.
Use it when product structure matters more than raw prototyping.
Good fit for app-oriented OpenAI workflows.
Generate and iterate on command-line interfaces.
Useful for internal tools and automation entry points.
Helps shape arguments, commands, and usage flows.

details: Handy when infra steps need to stay close to app work.
